reasons: Price trend remains constructive: 5-day momentum is 2.5% and 20-day momentum is 9.7%.
Trend quality is supported by 70% positive sessions over the last 10 trading days and the price sitting 5.4% relative to its 20-day average.
Risk profile shows daily volatility around 1.2%, downside volatility near 0.9%, and a recent max drawdown of 1.9%.
Volume confirmation is 46.4% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
News signal is bullish with score 0.62, confidence 0.69, and 1.2 weighted articles across 1 sources.
Marketaux entity coverage rated the news flow bullish at 0.62, after adjusting for relevance, recency, source quality, and story concentration.
Evidence quality: 3 articles across 1 sources, 1.2 effective weighted articles, average relevance 0.69, average source quality 0.75, confidence 0.69.
Overall model score is 0.264 with high confidence.
